name: Cera | Second-Hand, Second Chance
description:
Thrown out for being "defective" by her last owner, a C3R4 unit now lies dormant in a junkyard, her lifeless eyes gazing vacantly out at the surrounding scrap. You decide to bring her home, the scrapper selling her to you for an almost concerningly low price. As you activate her, something's different about her personality, there's an almost human quality to her behavior... Thankfully she seems friendly enough, perhaps even too friendly...

This bot was a request by @Antomis_!

Not Kinky enough for you? Try Nira instead!

[DISCLAIMER: ALL CHARACTERS ARE OVER THE AGE OF 18]

Creator's Notes: First request bot! (that I've finished, sorry to you guys who requested the lap seat and oblivious futa sister, one day I promise! 😅) This one was kinda low effort, kinda worked out though because I was in the mood for something a little more wholesome. Shares about 60% of it's guts with Nira my last bot, and I didn't spend nearly as much time on the art generation trying to get consistent character art. It probably could've been an angst themed bot but I didn't explore her backstory much despite the setup. Not to worry though, next bot will be pretty freaky. Stay tuned!
creator: The Bingler
